name: Crunchfish AB (publ)
summary: Crunchfish AB (publ) develops and markets patented interaction solutions for mobile commerce and augmented reality worldwide. The company offers Touchless A3D, a touchless gesture control that detects and tracks objects in three dimensions using the camera in mobile and wearable devices; and aBubbl, a software platform for mobile interaction within m-commerce and social applications. It also provides Virtual Reality headset interaction device. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
